text.title: Platform Engineering Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: baseline-survey
step.action: Quantify the friction: ticket volume / month, TTFD, NPS, top 3 dev complaints.
step.decision-gate: If you cannot quantify the friction, BLOCK — the platform business case is unprovable.

step.name: name-sponsor-and-non-goals
step.action: Get a named exec sponsor + budget envelope + signed non-goals list.
step.decision-gate: If no sponsor, STOP — platforms die without one.

step.name: build-orchestration-backend
step.action: Stand up Crossplane / Humanitec / Kratix; wire one cloud account with quotas + RBAC.
step.output: Backend that can provision a test service end-to-end

step.name: ship-one-golden-path
step.action: Implement template (Go micro / Node API / Python pipeline) + scaffolder + observability defaults.

step.name: add-portal
step.action: Stand up Backstage (or Port) catalogue; surface the scaffolder.

step.name: wire-metrics
step.action: Build dashboard: DORA + adoption + TTFD + NPS + ticket trend.

step.name: publish-and-iterate
step.action: Publish the spec to engineering wiki; review monthly; promote second golden path only when adoption of first ≥ 10 services.
